chapter_title: Inspection and review of first aid facilities
snippet: The principal or their delegate must ensure that regular inspections of first aid facilities, including a review of the first aid kits on site, are scheduled into the OHS activities calendar (XLSX) External Link or equivalent template and conducted using the First aid kit contents checklist (DOCX) External Link or equivalent template. The first aid officer should also ensure that first aid kit contents are restocked within date, as required. Automatic external defibrillators Chapter in the First Aid for Students and Staff Guidelines o... Medication Chapter in the First Aid for Students and Staff Guidelines o... Chapter in the First Aid for Students and Staff Guidelines outlining inspection requirements for first aid facilities Reviewed 17 June 2024
